title: botrychium lunaria
intro: Botrychium lunaria, also known as moonwort or silver fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Ophioglossaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Botrychium lunaria include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a treatment for skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Botrychium lunaria include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
